arts.ttl: Roma Taking a Hard Look at Como Coach for the Future
arts.sum: Roma have a few months to find their next coach and, after Francesco Farioli, they have set sights on another touted up-and-comer: Como manager Cesc Fabregas. He has caught their attention for his ability on the sidelines and in developing youngsters. The post Roma Taking a Hard Look at Como Coach for the Future appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Everton and AS Roma could share key role as Friedkins eye up major hire
arts.sum: Everton could share a director of football with AS Roma in the near future, as the Friedkin Group eye up former Atletico Madrid chief Andrea Berta. That’s according to La Repubblica, who report that the American group are considering a change at Roma and that could also end up affecting Everton.
